acidity.scientific: Acidity is often linked to excess gastric acid, irregular meal timing, and food triggers.
acidity.simple: Your stomach is getting irritated, usually because of spicy/oily food or late meals.
acidity.grandma: Beta, garam-masala aur late-night snacks kam karo, nariyal pani lo, pet shaant rahega.

indigestion.scientific: Indigestion can occur due to poor digestion kinetics, overeating, or low gut motility.
indigestion.simple: Your food is not digesting properly, often due to heavy meals or fast eating.
indigestion.grandma: Beta, aram se chaba ke khao, ajwain-garam paani lo, pet halka lagega.

anxiety.scientific: Anxiety can involve autonomic overactivation, poor sleep, and stress-hormone imbalance.
anxiety.simple: Your mind is overactive and stressed; calming routine and sleep support are needed.
anxiety.grandma: Beta, tel se pairon ki malish karo, garam doodh piyo, dheere-dheere saans lo.

insomnia.scientific: Insomnia is related to disrupted circadian rhythm, stress, and nighttime overstimulation.
insomnia.simple: Your sleep cycle is disturbed due to stress, screen time, or irregular routine.
insomnia.grandma: Beta, raat ko phone kam karo, garam doodh lo aur jaldi so jao.

joint pain.scientific: Joint pain may involve inflammation, cartilage wear, or mechanical stress.
joint pain.simple: Your joints may be stiff or inflamed, often due to strain or low mobility.
joint pain.grandma: Beta, til ke tel se halka sek karo, sharir ko thandi hawa se bachao.

ingredient_remedies.name: Turmeric Ginger Honey Decoction
ingredient_remedies.instructions: Boil 1 cup water with grated ginger and a pinch of turmeric for 5-7 minutes. Cool slightly and add honey. Drink warm twice daily.

ingredient_remedies.name: Jeera Ajwain Digestive Water
ingredient_remedies.instructions: Boil 1 tsp jeera and 1/2 tsp ajwain in 2 cups water until reduced to 1 cup. Sip warm after meals.

ingredient_remedies.name: Tulsi Black Pepper Kadha
ingredient_remedies.instructions: Boil tulsi leaves, crushed black pepper, and ginger in water for 8 minutes. Strain and sip warm.

ingredient_remedies.name: Fennel Cumin Calm Tea
ingredient_remedies.instructions: Boil fennel and cumin in water for 6 minutes. Drink warm after meals.

suggestions: Warm sesame oil foot massage before sleep
Deep breathing for 7 minutes twice daily
Warm herbal tea and light meals

prakriti_questions: Mind tendency (quick anxious / focused intense / calm steady)
